monday.description: Build clean coordination between your fretting and picking hands. Speed comes from accuracy and relaxation, not force.

exercises.name: Ascending Chromatic Motif
exercises.tips: No tension in forearms. Let speed come from efficiency, not force.

exercises.name: Asymmetrical Chromatic Grouping
exercises.tips: Strict alternate picking. Keep accents consistent even as they shift against the beat.

tuesday.description: Improve accuracy and control when moving across non-adjacent strings.

exercises.name: Skipped Triad Shapes
exercises.tips: Pick deliberately with clean silence between strings. Avoid raking.

exercises.name: Inside–Outside Skip Alternation
exercises.description:
Same note pattern, but picking approach alternates every rep.

Rep 1: inside picking
Rep 2: outside picking
Rep 3: alternate freely but consciously

```
e|---------7-----------|
B|-----8-------8-------|
G|-9---------------9---|
```
exercises.tips: Picking approach matters more than speed. No sweep shortcuts.

wednesday.description: Develop strict alternate picking technique with challenging string crossings.

exercises.name: Scalar Alternate Line
exercises.tips: Down-up consistency matters more than speed. No economy picking.

exercises.name: String-Crossing Displacement Run
exercises.description:
Odd note groupings that cross strings mid-group. Group notes in sets of 5. Accents move each bar.

```
e|-------------5-7-|
B|---------5-7-----|
G|-----4-5---------|
D|-5-7-------------|
```
exercises.tips: Strict alternate picking. Do not correct crossings with economy/sweeps.

thursday.description: Improve reach, independence, and comfort in the fretting hand. Always prioritize comfort over stretch.

exercises.name: Four-Fret Expansion
exercises.tips: No pain, ever. Keep thumb relaxed behind the neck.

exercises.name: Held-Anchor Stretch Line
exercises.description:
One finger stays planted while others stretch away. Index finger remains anchored on the lowest note.

```
e|----------------|
B|---------6-9----|
G|------5---------|
D|-4--------------|
```
exercises.tips: Anchor finger never lifts. Slow, deliberate motion only.

friday.description: Build fretting hand strength and articulation through legato techniques.

exercises.name: Hammer-On / Pull-Off Ladder
exercises.tips: Aim for clear articulation without collapsing fingers.

exercises.name: Offset Legato Accents
exercises.description:
Legato line with accents that shift independently of fingering. Accent every 4th note regardless of finger pattern.

```
e|----------------5h7h8p7p5-|
B|------------5h7-----------|
G|--------4h6---------------|
D|-5h7----------------------|
```
exercises.tips: No extra pick attack. Accents come from fretting hand only.

saturday.description: Train clean position shifts and confident note placement across the fretboard.

exercises.name: Position Jump Motifs
exercises.description:
Jump cleanly between positions. Visualize the target fret before moving.

```
e|------5-7---------10-12-|
B|--6-8-------------------|
G|------------------------|
```
exercises.tips: Land decisively. Avoid sliding into position.

exercises.name: Blind Position Targeting
exercises.description:
Jump between positions without visual confirmation. Look away after the first position. Land cleanly on the target.

```
e|------5-----------12-|
B|--6-8----------------|
```
exercises.tips: No slides into position. Land directly on the target note.

sunday.description: Practice smooth chord changes and continuous musical movement.

exercises.name: Triad Flow
exercises.description:
Move shapes smoothly with no gaps.

```
e|-5---7---8-|
B|-5---7---8-|
G|-5---7---8-|
```
exercises.tips: Lift fingers minimally. Let shapes blur into each other without rushing.

exercises.name: Voice-Led Triad Transitions
exercises.description:
One voice moves stepwise while others remain fixed. Only one finger moves per transition.

```
e|-5---5---6-|
B|-5---6---6-|
G|-5---5---5-|
```
exercises.tips: No full chord lifts. Smooth voice leading prioritized over speed.
